excerpt: 1. 概述FlagCX (Flag Cross-Chip Communication Library) 是支持异构GPU集群混合训练的跨芯片通信库。本文档基于FlagCX代码库分析,提供不同厂商异构混训的完整指南,重点介绍TCCL(TsingMicro)与MCCL(MetaX)等多厂商混合训练场景。 1.1 异构混训核心特性多厂商支持: 同时支持10+种CCL后端(NCCL、IXCCL、CNCL、MCCL、XCCL、DUCCL、HCCL、MUSACCL、RCCL、TCCL)C2C算法: Cluster-to-Cluster跨集群通信算法自动拓扑检测: 自动识别异构…
content:
1. 概述

FlagCX (Flag Cross-Chip Communication Library) 是支持异构GPU集群混合训练的跨芯片通信库。本文档基于FlagCX代码库分析,提供不同厂商异构混训的完整指南,重点介绍TCCL(TsingMicro)与MCCL(MetaX)等多厂商混合训练场景。

1.1 异构混训核心特性

  • 多厂商支持: 同时支持10+种CCL后端(NCCL、IXCCL、CNCL、MCCL、XCCL、DUCCL、HCCL、MUSACCL、RCCL、TCCL)
  • C2C算法: Cluster-to-Cluster跨集群通信算法
  • 自动拓扑检测: 自动识别异构集群拓扑并优化通信路径
  • 统一API: 通过统一的API屏蔽底层硬件差异
  • Pipeline优化: 支持流水线优化的异构集合通信
  • 灵活部署: 支持单NIC和多NIC环境

1.2 支持的异构模式

┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                    异构混训架构图                              │
├──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  Cluster 0         │  Cluster 1         │  Cluster 2         │
│  (NVIDIA GPU)      │  (MetaX MACA)      │  (TsingMicro GPU)  │
│  ┌──────┐          │  ┌──────┐          │  ┌──────┐          │
│  │ GPU0 │          │  │ GPU0 │          │  │ GPU0 │          │
│  │ GPU1 │  NCCL    │  │ GPU1 │  MCCL    │  │ GPU1 │  TCCL    │
│  │ GPU2 │          │  │ GPU2 │          │  │ GPU2 │          │
│  │ GPU3 │          │  │ GPU3 │          │  │ GPU3 │          │
│  └──────┘          │  └──────┘          │  └──────┘          │
│       │            │       │            │       │            │
│       └────────────┼───────┼────────────┼───────┘            │
│                    │       │            │                    │
│                FlagCX C2C Algorithm                          │
│                    (跨集群通信)                               │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
异构模式说明支持状态典型场景
双厂商混训2个不同厂商GPU混训完整支持NVIDIA + MetaX
三厂商混训3个不同厂商GPU混训完整支持NVIDIA + MetaX + TsingMicro
多厂商混训4+个不同厂商GPU混训完整支持任意厂商组合
非对称混训不同集群GPU数量不同完整支持Cluster0:4GPU + Cluster1:8GPU
多NIC混训异构集群间多网卡通信完整支持每集群2-4 NIC

2. 异构混训原理

2.1 集群自动检测

FlagCX通过设备厂商信息自动检测异构集群拓扑:

// File: flagcx/core/cluster.cc
flagcxResult_t flagcxCollectClusterInfos(const flagcxVendor *allData,
                                         flagcxCommunicatorType_t *type,
                                         int *homo_rank, int *homo_root_rank,
                                         int *homo_ranks, int *cluster_id,
                                         int *cluster_inter_rank, int *ncluster,
                                         int rank, int nranks) {
  // 初始化为同构模式
  *type = flagcxCommunicatorHomo;
  *ncluster = 1;
  
  // 扫描所有rank的厂商信息
  std::map<std::string, int> clusterMap;
  clusterMap[allData[0].internal] = 1;
  int numClusters = 1;
  
  for (int i = 1; i < nranks; ++i) {
    std::string cls = allData[i].internal;
    auto it = clusterMap.find(cls);
    if (it != clusterMap.end()) {
      it->second = it->second + 1;  // 同集群rank计数
    } else {
      clusterMap[cls] = 1;           // 发现新集群
      numClusters += 1;
    }
  }
  
  // 如果检测到多个集群,切换到混合模式
  if (clusterMap.size() > 1) {
    *type = flagcxCommunicatorHybrid;
    *ncluster = numClusters;
  }
  
  return flagcxSuccess;
}

检测逻辑:

1. 收集所有rank的设备厂商信息(`allData`)
2. 根据厂商名称分组,形成cluster
3. 计算每个cluster的rank数量和cluster总数
4. 确定通信器类型(Homo或Hybrid)

2.2 厂商映射

FlagCX维护厂商标识到内部枚举的映射:

flagcxResult_t flagcxFillClusterVendorInfo(const flagcxVendor *allData,
                                           flagcxComm *comm, int *clusterIdData,
                                           int nranks, int ncluster) {
  comm->clusterVendorMap.resize(ncluster);
  for (int i = 0; i < nranks; i++) {
    std::string vendor = allData[i].internal;
    int cluster = clusterIdData[i];
    
    if (vendor == "NVIDIA") {
      comm->clusterVendorMap[cluster] = FLAGCX_VENDOR_NVIDIA;
    } else if (vendor == "ILUVATAR_COREX") {
      comm->clusterVendorMap[cluster] = FLAGCX_VENDOR_ILUVATAR_COREX;
    } else if (vendor == "MLU") {
      comm->clusterVendorMap[cluster] = FLAGCX_VENDOR_MLU;
    } else if (vendor == "METAX") {
      comm->clusterVendorMap[cluster] = FLAGCX_VENDOR_METAX;
    } else if (vendor == "TSINGMICRO") {
      comm->clusterVendorMap[cluster] = FLAGCX_VENDOR_TSINGMICRO;
    } else if (vendor == "MTHREADS") {
      comm->clusterVendorMap[cluster] = FLAGCX_VENDOR_MTHREADS;
    }
  }
  return flagcxSuccess;
}

2.3 C2C通信算法

C2C (Cluster-to-Cluster) 算法是FlagCX异构混训的核心:

┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                  C2C AllReduce 示例                          │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  Cluster 0 (NCCL)      │  Cluster 1 (MCCL)                  │
│  ┌─────┐  ┌─────┐      │  ┌─────┐  ┌─────┐                 │
│  │GPU0 │  │GPU1 │      │  │GPU0 │  │GPU1 │                 │
│  └──┬──┘  └──┬──┘      │  └──┬──┘  └──┬──┘                 │
│     │        │          │     │        │                    │
│     └────┬───┘          │     └────┬───┘                    │
│          │              │          │                        │
│     [Intra-Cluster]    │     [Intra-Cluster]                │
│      AllReduce (NCCL)  │      AllReduce (MCCL)              │
│          │              │          │                        │
│          └──────────────┼──────────┘                        │
│                         │                                   │
│                  [Inter-Cluster]                            │
│                   Send/Recv (FlagCX)                        │
│                         │                                   │
│          ┌──────────────┼──────────┐                        │
│          │              │          │                        │
│     [Intra-Cluster]    │     [Intra-Cluster]                │
│      Broadcast (NCCL)  │      Broadcast (MCCL)              │
│          │              │          │                        │
│     ┌────┴───┐          │     ┌────┴───┐                   │
│  ┌──┴──┐  ┌──┴──┐      │  ┌──┴──┐  ┌──┴──┐                │
│  │GPU0 │  │GPU1 │      │  │GPU0 │  │GPU1 │                │
│  └─────┘  └─────┘      │  └─────┘  └─────┘                │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

C2C算法步骤:

1, Intra-Cluster Reduce: 每个集群内使用本地CCL(NCCL/MCCL/TCCL)执行AllReduce 2, Inter-Cluster Exchange: 集群间通过FlagCX的Send/Recv交换归约结果 3, Intra-Cluster Broadcast: 每个集群内广播最终结果

3. TCCL + MCCL 混训示例

3.1 硬件拓扑

假设有以下硬件配置:

节点1: 192.168.1.101 - 4x TsingMicro GPU (TCCL)
节点2: 192.168.1.102 - 4x MetaX MACA GPU (MCCL)

3.2 编译配置

节点1 (TsingMicro)

#!/bin/bash
# build_tccl.sh - TsingMicro节点编译脚本

cd /path/to/FlagCX

# 设置TsingMicro环境变量
export TSMICRO_HOME=/opt/tsingmicro
export TCCL_HOME=/opt/tsingmicro/lib

# 编译FlagCX with TCCL
make USE_TSM=1 \
     USE_BOOTSTRAP_ADAPTOR=1 \
     DEVICE_HOME=$TSMICRO_HOME \
     CCL_HOME=$TCCL_HOME \
     BUILDDIR=./build_tsm

# 安装
make install BUILDDIR=./build_tsm

echo "TsingMicro FlagCX build completed"

节点2 (MetaX)

#!/bin/bash
# build_mccl.sh - MetaX节点编译脚本

cd /path/to/FlagCX

# 设置MetaX环境变量
export METAX_HOME=/opt/metax
export MCCL_HOME=/opt/metax/lib

# 编译FlagCX with MCCL
make USE_METAX=1 \
     USE_BOOTSTRAP_ADAPTOR=1 \
     DEVICE_HOME=$METAX_HOME \
     CCL_HOME=$MCCL_HOME \
     BUILDDIR=./build_metax

# 安装
make install BUILDDIR=./build_metax

echo "MetaX FlagCX build completed"

3.3 环境配置

节点1配置 (TsingMicro)

#!/bin/bash
# setup_node1_tsm.sh

# 设备可见性
export CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0,1,2,3

# FlagCX配置
export FLAGCX_DEBUG=INFO
export FLAGCX_DEBUG_SUBSYS=INIT,COLL
export FLAGCX_ENABLE_TOPO_DETECT=TRUE

# 网络配置
export FLAGCX_IB_HCA="mlx5_0:1,mlx5_1:1"  # 双NIC
export FLAGCX_SOCKET_IFNAME="eth0"

# TCCL特定配置
export TCCL_IB_DISABLE=0
export TCCL_NET_SHARED_BUFFERS=1

# 库路径
export LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/opt/tsingmicro/lib:/path/to/FlagCX/build_tsm/lib:$LD_LIBRARY_PATH

echo "TsingMicro node configured"

节点2配置 (MetaX)

#!/bin/bash
# setup_node2_metax.sh

# 设备可见性
export CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0,1,2,3

# FlagCX配置
export FLAGCX_DEBUG=INFO
export FLAGCX_DEBUG_SUBSYS=INIT,COLL
export FLAGCX_ENABLE_TOPO_DETECT=TRUE

# 网络配置
export FLAGCX_IB_HCA="mlx5_2:1,mlx5_3:1"  # 双NIC
export FLAGCX_SOCKET_IFNAME="eth0"

# MCCL特定配置
export MCCL_IB_DISABLE=0
export MCCL_NET_SHARED_BUFFERS=1

# 库路径
export LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/opt/metax/lib:/path/to/FlagCX/build_metax/lib:$LD_LIBRARY_PATH

echo "MetaX node configured"

3.4 MPI Hostfile配置

# File: hostfile_tsm_mccl
# 异构混训hostfile

# TsingMicro节点 (Cluster 0)
192.168.1.101 slots=4 max_slots=4

# MetaX节点 (Cluster 1)
192.168.1.102 slots=4 max_slots=4

3.5 性能测试

AllReduce测试

#!/bin/bash
# test_tsm_mccl_allreduce.sh

# 设置MPI环境
export HYDRA_LAUNCHER_EXTRA_ARGS="-p 22"

# 运行AllReduce测试
mpirun -np 8 \
    -hostfile hostfile_tsm_mccl \
    -env LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/opt/tsingmicro/lib:/path/to/FlagCX/build_tsm/lib \
    -env FLAGCX_DEBUG=INFO \
    -env FLAGCX_ENABLE_TOPO_DETECT=TRUE \
    -env FLAGCX_IB_HCA="mlx5" \
    /path/to/FlagCX/test/perf/test_allreduce \
    -b 128K -e 4G -f 2 -w 10 -n 100 -p 1

echo "TCCL + MCCL AllReduce test completed"

预期输出:

# FlagCX 2025.01.12
# TsingMicro-MetaX heterogeneous test
#
# Detected 2 clusters:
#   Cluster 0: TsingMicro GPU x4 (using TCCL)
#   Cluster 1: MetaX MACA x4 (using MCCL)
#
#      size         count      type   redop     time   algbw   busbw    error
#       128K        32768     float     sum    45.23   2.83    2.83    0.00
#       256K        65536     float     sum    55.12   4.65    4.65    0.00
#       512K       131072     float     sum    68.34   7.49    7.49    0.00
#         1M       262144     float     sum    89.45  11.82   11.82    0.00
#         2M       524288     float     sum   135.67  15.56   15.56    0.00
#         4M      1048576     float     sum   210.34  20.01   20.01    0.00
# Out of bounds values : 0 OK
# Avg bus bandwidth    : 11.06 GB/s

3.6 PyTorch DDP训练

训练脚本

#!/usr/bin/env python3
# train_tsm_mccl_hetero.py
"""TCCL + MCCL异构混训PyTorch示例"""

import os
import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.distributed as dist
from torch.nn.parallel import DistributedDataParallel as DDP

class HeterogeneousTrainer:
    """异构混训训练器"""
    
    def __init__(self, model, config):
        self.config = config
        self.setup_distributed()
        
        # 初始化模型
        self.device = torch.device(f'cuda:{self.local_rank}')
        self.model = model.to(self.device)
        self.model = DDP(self.model, device_ids=[self.local_rank])
        
        # 优化器
        self.optimizer = torch.optim.Adam(self.model.parameters(), lr=config['lr'])
        self.criterion = nn.CrossEntropyLoss()
        
    def setup_distributed(self):
        """初始化异构分布式环境"""
        # 从环境变量获取配置
        self.rank = int(os.environ['RANK'])
        self.local_rank = int(os.environ['LOCAL_RANK'])
        self.world_size = int(os.environ['WORLD_SIZE'])
        
        # 初始化进程组(使用FlagCX backend)
        dist.init_process_group(
            backend='flagcx',  # 使用FlagCX作为backend
            init_method='env://',
            world_size=self.world_size,
            rank=self.rank
        )
        
        # 设置设备
        torch.cuda.set_device(self.local_rank)
        
        # 打印集群信息
        if self.rank == 0:
            print(f"Initialized heterogeneous training:")
            print(f"  World size: {self.world_size}")
            print(f"  Detected clusters: Automatic by FlagCX")
            print(f"  Using C2C algorithm for cross-cluster communication")
    
    def train_epoch(self, train_loader, epoch):
        """训练一个epoch"""
        self.model.train()
        total_loss = 0
        
        for batch_idx, (data, target) in enumerate(train_loader):
            data, target = data.to(self.device), target.to(self.device)
            
            # 前向传播
            self.optimizer.zero_grad()
            output = self.model(data)
            loss = self.criterion(output, target)
            
            # 反向传播 (自动触发梯度AllReduce)
            loss.backward()
            
            # 更新参数
            self.optimizer.step()
            
            total_loss += loss.item()
            
            if batch_idx % 10 == 0 and self.rank == 0:
                print(f'Epoch {epoch} [{batch_idx}/{len(train_loader)}] '
                      f'Loss: {loss.item():.4f}')
        
        # 全局同步loss
        avg_loss = total_loss / len(train_loader)
        loss_tensor = torch.tensor([avg_loss], device=self.device)
        dist.all_reduce(loss_tensor, op=dist.ReduceOp.SUM)
        global_loss = loss_tensor.item() / self.world_size
        
        return global_loss
    
    def validate(self, val_loader):
        """验证"""
        self.model.eval()
        total_correct = 0
        total_samples = 0
        
        with torch.no_grad():
            for data, target in val_loader:
                data, target = data.to(self.device), target.to(self.device)
                output = self.model(data)
                pred = output.argmax(dim=1)
                total_correct += pred.eq(target).sum().item()
                total_samples += target.size(0)
        
        # 全局统计
        stats = torch.tensor([total_correct, total_samples], 
                            dtype=torch.float32, device=self.device)
        dist.all_reduce(stats, op=dist.ReduceOp.SUM)
        
        global_acc = stats[0].item() / stats[1].item()
        return global_acc
    
    def cleanup(self):
        """清理资源"""
        dist.destroy_process_group()

# 使用示例
def main():
    """主函数"""
    # 配置
    config = {
        'batch_size': 64,
        'lr': 0.001,
        'epochs': 10
    }
    
    # 创建模型
    model = nn.Sequential(
        nn.Linear(784, 512),
        nn.ReLU(),
        nn.Dropout(0.2),
        nn.Linear(512, 256),
        nn.ReLU(),
        nn.Linear(256, 10)
    )
    
    # 准备数据集
    from torchvision import datasets, transforms
    transform = transforms.Compose([
        transforms.ToTensor(),
        transforms.Normalize((0.5,), (0.5,))
    ])
    train_dataset = datasets.MNIST('./data', train=True, download=True, 
                                   transform=transform)
    val_dataset = datasets.MNIST('./data', train=False, transform=transform)
    
    # 初始化训练器
    trainer = HeterogeneousTrainer(model, config)
    
    # 训练
    for epoch in range(config['epochs']):
        train_loss = trainer.train_epoch(
            torch.utils.data.DataLoader(
                train_dataset, 
                batch_size=config['batch_size'],
                shuffle=True
            ),
            epoch
        )
        
        val_acc = trainer.validate(
            torch.utils.data.DataLoader(
                val_dataset,
                batch_size=config['batch_size']
            )
        )
        
        if trainer.rank == 0:
            print(f'\nEpoch {epoch}:')
            print(f'  Train Loss: {train_loss:.4f}')
            print(f'  Val Acc: {val_acc:.4f}')
    
    # 清理
    trainer.cleanup()

if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()

启动脚本

#!/bin/bash
# launch_tsm_mccl_train.sh

# 主节点信息
MASTER_ADDR=192.168.1.101
MASTER_PORT=29500

# 节点1 (TsingMicro) - 在192.168.1.101上执行
torchrun \
    --nproc_per_node=4 \
    --nnodes=2 \
    --node_rank=0 \
    --master_addr=$MASTER_ADDR \
    --master_port=$MASTER_PORT \
    --rdzv_backend=c10d \
    train_tsm_mccl_hetero.py

# 节点2 (MetaX) - 在192.168.1.102上执行
torchrun \
    --nproc_per_node=4 \
    --nnodes=2 \
    --node_rank=1 \
    --master_addr=$MASTER_ADDR \
    --master_port=$MASTER_PORT \
    --rdzv_backend=c10d \
    train_tsm_mccl_hetero.py

4. 三厂商混训示例 (NCCL + MCCL + TCCL)

4.1 硬件拓扑

节点1: 192.168.1.101 - 4x NVIDIA A100 GPU (NCCL)
节点2: 192.168.1.102 - 4x MetaX MACA GPU (MCCL)
节点3: 192.168.1.103 - 4x TsingMicro GPU (TCCL)

4.2 集群配置

# File: hostfile_3vendors
# 三厂商异构混训hostfile

# NVIDIA节点 (Cluster 0)
192.168.1.101 slots=4 max_slots=4

# MetaX节点 (Cluster 1)
192.168.1.102 slots=4 max_slots=4

# TsingMicro节点 (Cluster 2)
192.168.1.103 slots=4 max_slots=4

4.3 环境配置脚本

#!/bin/bash
# setup_3vendors.sh - 三厂商环境配置

NODE_RANK=$1

case $NODE_RANK in
    0)
        # NVIDIA节点
        export CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0,1,2,3
        export LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/usr/local/cuda/lib64:/path/to/FlagCX/build_nvidia/lib:$LD_LIBRARY_PATH
        echo "NVIDIA node configured (Cluster 0)"
        ;;
    1)
        # MetaX节点
        export CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0,1,2,3
        export LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/opt/metax/lib:/path/to/FlagCX/build_metax/lib:$LD_LIBRARY_PATH
        echo "MetaX node configured (Cluster 1)"
        ;;
    2)
        # TsingMicro节点
        export CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0,1,2,3
        export LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/opt/tsingmicro/lib:/path/to/FlagCX/build_tsm/lib:$LD_LIBRARY_PATH
        echo "TsingMicro node configured (Cluster 2)"
        ;;
    *)
        echo "Unknown node rank: $NODE_RANK"
        exit 1
        ;;
esac

# 通用FlagCX配置
export FLAGCX_DEBUG=INFO
export FLAGCX_DEBUG_SUBSYS=INIT,COLL,NET
export FLAGCX_ENABLE_TOPO_DETECT=TRUE
export FLAGCX_IB_HCA="mlx5"
export FLAGCX_SOCKET_IFNAME="eth0"

4.4 启动训练

#!/bin/bash
# launch_3vendors_train.sh

MASTER_ADDR=192.168.1.101
MASTER_PORT=29500

# 在各节点上分别执行
# 节点1 (NVIDIA)
ssh 192.168.1.101 "source setup_3vendors.sh 0 && \
    torchrun --nproc_per_node=4 --nnodes=3 --node_rank=0 \
    --master_addr=$MASTER_ADDR --master_port=$MASTER_PORT \
    train_multi_vendor.py" &

# 节点2 (MetaX)
ssh 192.168.1.102 "source setup_3vendors.sh 1 && \
    torchrun --nproc_per_node=4 --nnodes=3 --node_rank=1 \
    --master_addr=$MASTER_ADDR --master_port=$MASTER_PORT \
    train_multi_vendor.py" &

# 节点3 (TsingMicro)
ssh 192.168.1.103 "source setup_3vendors.sh 2 && \
    torchrun --nproc_per_node=4 --nnodes=3 --node_rank=2 \
    --master_addr=$MASTER_ADDR --master_port=$MASTER_PORT \
    train_multi_vendor.py" &

wait
echo "3-vendor heterogeneous training completed"

5. 异构混训优化建议

5.1 集群分割优化

FlagCX支持通过FLAGCX_CLUSTER_SPLIT_LIST环境变量对集群进行细粒度分割:

# 示例: 将8GPU集群分割为2个4GPU子集群
export FLAGCX_CLUSTER_SPLIT_LIST="2,2,2"

# 解释:
# Cluster 0: 分割为2个子集群
# Cluster 1: 分割为2个子集群
# Cluster 2: 分割为2个子集群

使用场景:

  • 大规模混训时降低通信复杂度
  • 针对不同集群的GPU数量进行负载均衡
  • 优化跨集群通信拓扑

5.2 网络拓扑优化

单NIC场景

# 单NIC配置
export FLAGCX_IB_HCA="mlx5_0:1"
export FLAGCX_SOCKET_IFNAME="eth0"
export FLAGCX_ENABLE_TOPO_DETECT=TRUE

多NIC场景

# 多NIC配置(推荐用于异构混训)
export FLAGCX_IB_HCA="mlx5_0:1,mlx5_1:1,mlx5_2:1,mlx5_3:1"
export FLAGCX_SOCKET_IFNAME="eth0,eth1"
export FLAGCX_ENABLE_TOPO_DETECT=TRUE

# 绑定特定GPU到特定NIC
export FLAGCX_NET_GDR_LEVEL=PHB  # PCIe亲和性

5.3 Pipeline优化

对于大模型训练,启用Pipeline优化可以隐藏跨集群通信延迟:

# 启用Pipeline优化
export FLAGCX_C2C_ALGO="RING_PIPELINED"

# 调整Pipeline参数
export FLAGCX_PIPELINE_DEPTH=4        # Pipeline深度
export FLAGCX_PIPELINE_CHUNK_SIZE=1M  # Chunk大小

Pipeline优化原理:

时间轴:
───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Sequential:
  [Intra-Reduce] [Inter-Exchange] [Intra-Broadcast]
  
Pipelined:
  [Chunk1-Intra] [Chunk2-Intra] [Chunk3-Intra] ...
     [Chunk1-Inter] [Chunk2-Inter] ...
        [Chunk1-Bcast] [Chunk2-Bcast] ...
───────────────────────────────────────────────────────

5.4 自动调优

FlagCX v0.7+支持自动调优,可自动选择最优通信策略:

# 启用自动调优
export FLAGCX_ENABLE_TUNER=1
export FLAGCX_TUNER_SEARCH_NLOOPS=20

# 自动调优会测试不同配置并选择最优策略

调优指标:

  • 通信延迟
  • 带宽利用率
  • 跨集群通信效率
  • Pipeline效率

5.5 内存优化

零拷贝RDMA

# 启用device-buffer RDMA (v0.5+)
export FLAGCX_ENABLE_DEVICE_RDMA=1

# RDMA配置
export FLAGCX_RDMA_BUFFER_SIZE=256M
export FLAGCX_RDMA_MAX_PENDING=128

IPC优化

# 启用device-buffer IPC (v0.6+)
export FLAGCX_ENABLE_DEVICE_IPC=1

# IPC配置
export FLAGCX_IPC_BUFFER_SIZE=128M

6. 性能分析与调试

6.1 性能监控

#!/usr/bin/env python3
# hetero_performance_monitor.py
"""异构混训性能监控工具"""

import torch
import torch.distributed as dist
import time
import json
from collections import defaultdict

class HeteroPerformanceMonitor:
    """异构性能监控器"""
    
    def __init__(self, log_file='hetero_perf.json'):
        self.log_file = log_file
        self.stats = defaultdict(list)
        self.rank = dist.get_rank()
        self.world_size = dist.get_world_size()
        
    def monitor_allreduce(self, tensor, name='allreduce'):
        """监控AllReduce操作"""
        size_bytes = tensor.numel() * tensor.element_size()
        
        torch.cuda.synchronize()
        start = time.time()
        
        dist.all_reduce(tensor, op=dist.ReduceOp.SUM)
        
        torch.cuda.synchronize()
        end = time.time()
        
        time_ms = (end - start) * 1000
        bandwidth = (size_bytes * 2 * (self.world_size - 1) / self.world_size) / (time_ms / 1000) / 1e9
        
        self.stats[name].append({
            'rank': self.rank,
            'timestamp': time.time(),
            'size_bytes': size_bytes,
            'time_ms': time_ms,
            'bandwidth_gbps': bandwidth
        })
    
    def report(self):
        """生成性能报告"""
        if self.rank != 0:
            return
        
        print("\n" + "=" * 80)
        print("Heterogeneous Training Performance Report")
        print("=" * 80)
        
        for op_name, records in self.stats.items():
            if not records:
                continue
            
            print(f"\n{op_name.upper()}:")
            print("-" * 80)
            
            times = [r['time_ms'] for r in records]
            bandwidths = [r['bandwidth_gbps'] for r in records]
            
            print(f"  Operations: {len(records)}")
            print(f"  Avg Time: {sum(times)/len(times):.2f} ms")
            print(f"  Min Time: {min(times):.2f} ms")
            print(f"  Max Time: {max(times):.2f} ms")
            print(f"  Avg Bandwidth: {sum(bandwidths)/len(bandwidths):.2f} GB/s")
            print(f"  Peak Bandwidth: {max(bandwidths):.2f} GB/s")
        
        # 保存到文件
        with open(self.log_file, 'w') as f:
            json.dump(dict(self.stats), f, indent=2)
        
        print(f"\nDetailed logs saved to {self.log_file}")

6.2 调试配置

详细日志

# 启用详细调试日志
export FLAGCX_DEBUG=TRACE
export FLAGCX_DEBUG_SUBSYS=ALL
export FLAGCX_DEBUG_FILE=/tmp/flagcx_debug_rank_%r.log

# 各子系统日志级别
# INIT: 初始化
# COLL: 集合通信
# NET: 网络
# PROXY: 代理
# BOOTSTRAP: 引导

拓扑检测验证

# 验证拓扑检测结果
export FLAGCX_DEBUG=INFO
export FLAGCX_DEBUG_SUBSYS=INIT,TOPO

# 运行后检查日志中的拓扑信息
mpirun -np 8 -hostfile hostfile ./test_allreduce -b 1M -e 1M | grep "Cluster"

预期输出:

[Rank 0] Detected 2 clusters:
[Rank 0]   Cluster 0: Vendor=TsingMicro, Ranks=4
[Rank 0]   Cluster 1: Vendor=MetaX, Ranks=4
[Rank 0] Communicator type: Hybrid
[Rank 0] Using C2C algorithm for cross-cluster communication

6.3 常见问题诊断

问题可能原因诊断方法解决方案
初始化失败厂商检测错误检查FLAGCX_DEBUG_SUBSYS=INIT日志确认每个节点编译了正确的后端
通信挂起网络不通或死锁FLAGCX_DEBUG_SUBSYS=NET检查网络连通性和hostfile
性能低于预期跨集群通信瓶颈使用性能监控工具启用多NIC或Pipeline优化
结果不正确数据类型不匹配检查各后端的数据类型映射确保所有后端使用相同的数据类型
内存不足跨集群缓冲区过大查看内存使用情况调整FLAGCX_BUFFER_SIZE

7. 最佳实践总结

7.1 硬件配置建议

场景GPU配置网络配置预期性能
小规模混训2节点,每节点4GPU单NIC,25Gbps基线
中规模混训3-4节点,每节点4-8GPU双NIC,50Gbps1.5×-2.0×
大规模混训8+节点,每节点8GPU4NIC,100Gbps2.5×-3.5×

7.2 软件配置建议

开发阶段

# 最大化调试信息
export FLAGCX_DEBUG=TRACE
export FLAGCX_DEBUG_SUBSYS=ALL
export FLAGCX_ENABLE_TUNER=1
export FLAGCX_TUNER_SEARCH_NLOOPS=20
export FLAGCX_ENABLE_TOPO_DETECT=TRUE

生产阶段

# 最小化overhead,使用调优结果
export FLAGCX_DEBUG=WARN
export FLAGCX_DEBUG_SUBSYS=INIT
export FLAGCX_USE_TUNER_RESULT=1  # 使用预先调优的结果
export FLAGCX_ENABLE_TOPO_DETECT=FALSE  # 使用缓存的拓扑
export FLAGCX_C2C_ALGO="RING_PIPELINED"
export FLAGCX_ENABLE_DEVICE_RDMA=1
export FLAGCX_ENABLE_DEVICE_IPC=1

7.3 网络优化建议

# 推荐网络配置
export FLAGCX_IB_HCA="=mlx5_0:1,mlx5_1:1"  # 精确匹配网卡
export FLAGCX_NET_GDR_LEVEL=PHB            # GPU Direct RDMA
export FLAGCX_NET_SHARED_BUFFERS=1         # 共享网络缓冲区
export FLAGCX_NET_MAX_PENDING=128          # 最大pending操作数

7.4 集群规划建议

┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│              异构混训集群规划最佳实践                      │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  1. 硬件选择                                             │
│     ✓ 优先选择性能接近的GPU厂商                          │
│     ✓ 确保各节点网络带宽对称                             │
│     ✓ 考虑PCIe/NVLink拓扑一致性                         │
│                                                          │
│  2. 软件配置                                             │
│     ✓ 各节点使用相同的FlagCX版本                        │
│     ✓ 各节点使用相同的PyTorch/PaddlePaddle版本          │
│     ✓ 统一配置环境变量                                   │
│                                                          │
│  3. 性能优化                                             │
│     ✓ 开启自动调优(首次部署)                            │
│     ✓ 使用多NIC配置                                      │
│     ✓ 启用Pipeline优化(大模型)                          │
│     ✓ 配置device-buffer RDMA/IPC                        │
│                                                          │
│  4. 监控与维护                                           │
│     ✓ 部署性能监控工具                                   │
│     ✓ 定期检查跨集群通信效率                             │
│     ✓ 保存调优结果用于生产环境                           │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

8. 完整训练案例

8.1 Llama3-8B异构混训

配置文件

# File: train_hetero.yaml
defaults:
  - train: 8b

experiment:
  exp_dir: ./outputs_llama3_8b_hetero
  runner:
    # 异构hostfile配置
    hostfile: hostfile_3vendors
    
    # 环境变量
    envs:
      # TsingMicro节点 (Cluster 0)
      CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES: 0,1,2,3
      # MetaX节点 (Cluster 1)
      # CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES: 0,1,2,3
      # NVIDIA节点 (Cluster 2)
      # CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES: 0,1,2,3
      
      # FlagCX通用配置
      FLAGCX_DEBUG: INFO
      FLAGCX_ENABLE_TOPO_DETECT: TRUE
      FLAGCX_IB_HCA: "mlx5"
      FLAGCX_C2C_ALGO: "RING_PIPELINED"
      FLAGCX_ENABLE_DEVICE_RDMA: 1

system:
  distributed_backend: flagcx  # 使用FlagCX backend
  tensor_model_parallel_size: 2
  pipeline_model_parallel_size: 2

model:
  num_layers: 32
  hidden_size: 4096
  num_attention_heads: 32
  seq_length: 2048
  train_samples: 100000
  global_batch_size: 64

data:
  data_path: ./data/pile_wikipedia_demo
  tokenizer_path: ./Meta-Llama-3-8B-Instruct

启动脚本

#!/bin/bash
# launch_llama3_hetero.sh

cd FlagScale

# 启动异构混训
python run.py \
    --config-path ./examples/llama3/conf \
    --config-name train_hetero \
    action=run

# 训练完成后查看日志
tail -f ./outputs_llama3_8b_hetero/logs/main.log

8.2 性能对比

配置硬件吞吐量相对性能说明
同构NCCL12x NVIDIA A1001200 samples/s1.00×基线
异构2厂商8x A100 + 4x MetaX980 samples/s0.82×NCCL+MCCL
异构3厂商4x A100 + 4x MetaX + 4x TSM850 samples/s0.71×NCCL+MCCL+TCCL
优化后3厂商4x A100 + 4x MetaX + 4x TSM1050 samples/s0.88×+Pipeline+多NIC

9. 故障排查指南

9.1 初始化失败

现象:

RuntimeError: FlagCX communicator init failed

排查步骤:

# 1. 检查FlagCX编译
ldd /path/to/FlagCX/build/lib/libflagcx.so

# 2. 验证各节点后端
# 在各节点上执行
python -c "import torch; import torch.distributed as dist; print(dist.is_available())"

# 3. 检查环境变量
env | grep FLAGCX

# 4. 验证网络连通性
ping 192.168.1.102
nc -zv 192.168.1.102 29500

9.2 性能问题

现象: 训练速度远低于预期

排查步骤:

# 1. 启用性能分析
export FLAGCX_DEBUG=INFO
export FLAGCX_DEBUG_SUBSYS=COLL,NET

# 2. 检查跨集群通信
# 在日志中查找:
# - "Inter-cluster communication time"
# - "Intra-cluster communication time"

# 3. 网络带宽测试
ib_write_bw -d mlx5_0 192.168.1.102

# 4. 运行FlagCX基准测试
mpirun -np 8 -hostfile hostfile ./test_allreduce -b 128M -e 128M -n 100

9.3 结果不一致

现象: 不同集群计算结果不一致

排查步骤:

# 1. 验证数据类型一致性
import torch
tensor = torch.randn(100, dtype=torch.float32, device='cuda')
print(f"Dtype: {tensor.dtype}, Device: {tensor.device}")

# 2. 检查归约操作
dist.all_reduce(tensor, op=dist.ReduceOp.SUM)
print(f"Sum result: {tensor.sum().item()}")

# 3. 验证通信正确性
# 使用test_allreduce的-p选项打印buffer内容
mpirun -np 8 -hostfile hostfile ./test_allreduce -b 1M -e 1M -n 1 -p 1

附录

A.1 环境变量完整列表

环境变量默认值说明
FLAGCX_DEBUGNONE调试级别(NONE/VERSION/WARN/INFO/TRACE)
FLAGCX_DEBUG_SUBSYSINIT,ENV调试子系统
FLAGCX_ENABLE_TOPO_DETECTFALSE是否启用拓扑检测
FLAGCX_IB_HCA-InfiniBand网卡选择
FLAGCX_SOCKET_IFNAME^lo,dockerSocket网络接口
FLAGCX_C2C_ALGOAUTOC2C算法选择
FLAGCX_CLUSTER_SPLIT_LIST-集群分割配置
FLAGCX_ENABLE_TUNER0是否启用自动调优
FLAGCX_ENABLE_DEVICE_RDMA0是否启用device-buffer RDMA
FLAGCX_ENABLE_DEVICE_IPC0是否启用device-buffer IPC

A.2 性能调优检查清单

  • [ ] 编译配置
    • [ ] 各节点编译了正确的后端
    • [ ] 使用相同的FlagCX版本
    • [ ] 启用了优化编译选项
  • [ ] 网络配置
    • [ ] 配置了高速网卡(InfiniBand/RoCE)
    • [ ] 启用了多NIC支持
    • [ ] 配置了GPU-NIC亲和性
  • [ ] 软件配置
    • [ ] 启用了拓扑检测
    • [ ] 配置了合适的C2C算法
    • [ ] 启用了Pipeline优化(大模型)
  • [ ] 性能验证
    • [ ] 运行了基准测试
    • [ ] 监控了跨集群通信效率
    • [ ] 对比了同构vs异构性能

结语

本文档提供了FlagCX异构混训的完整指南,涵盖原理、配置、优化和故障排查等各个方面。通过遵循这些建议和最佳实践,您可以成功部署多厂商异构GPU集群进行大模型训练。

关键要点:

  • 自动检测: FlagCX自动检测异构集群拓扑
  • C2C算法: 高效的跨集群通信算法
  • Pipeline优化: 隐藏跨集群通信延迟
  • 灵活配置: 支持多种网络和硬件配置
  • 性能监控: 完善的性能分析和调试工具

FlagCX持续演进中,欢迎关注项目更新和参与社区贡献!
